title: Palindrome Check
description: Given a string, determine if it is a palindrome (reads the same forwards and backwards). Ignore spaces and consider lowercase only.
inputSpec: A single string (no newline issues, length ≤ 1000).
outputSpec: YES if it is a palindrome, NO otherwise.
constraints: Length ≤ 1000, only lowercase letters and spaces

botCodes.code: let()=let s=input_line stdin in let s=String.lowercase_ascii s in let n=String.length s in let ok=ref true in for i=0 to n/2-1 do if s.[i]<>s.[n-1-i] then ok:=false done;print_endline(if !ok then"YES" else"NO")
